effect_entries.effect:
Le type du lanceur change selon le terrain.

Terrain        | New type
-------------- | --------------
Bâtiment       | normal
Grotte           | rock
Désert         | ground
Herbe          | grass
Montagne       | rock
Eaux profondes          | water
Eaux peu profondes           | water
Route           | ground
Neige           | ice
Herbe haute     | grass

In Pokémon Battle Revolution:

Terrain        | New type
-------------- | --------------
Pleine-Lune      | normal
Cristal        | rock
Orée        | water
Cratère-Ardent          | rock
Grand-Rue    | normal
Belvédère           | normal
Ciel-Étoilé      | rock
Belle-Saison     | grass
Crépuscule         | ground
Hautes-Chutes      | grass
effect_entries.short_effect: Le type du lanceur change pour correspondre au terrain.

effect_entries.effect:
User’s type changes according to the terrain.

Terrain        | New type
-------------- | --------------
Building       | normal
Cave           | rock
Desert         | ground
Grass          | grass
Mountain       | rock
Ocean          | water
Pond           | water
Road           | ground
Snow           | ice
Tall grass     | grass

In Pokémon Battle Revolution:

Terrain        | New type
-------------- | --------------
Courtyard      | normal
Crystal        | rock
Gateway        | water
Magma          | rock
Main Street    | normal
Neon           | normal
Stargazer      | rock
Sunny Park     | grass
Sunset         | ground
Waterfall      | grass
effect_entries.short_effect: User’s type changes to match the terrain.
